name: WP-6 — Family: build family-domain v2 twins + guardianship authorization guards
description: Build family-bridge-v2, family-access-v2, dashboard-v2, notifications-v2, nudge-v2, and the guardianship guards validateGuardianshipEdgeV2 / validateGuardianChargeRelationshipV2 / getChargeSubjectsForGuardianV2 (HIGH, enumeration §4.3–4.5). Cross-person data, authorization-sensitive. Enumeration §3.4 / §6 WP-6.
acceptanceCriteria: Guards are built TDD enforcing guardianship/supportership authorization per the canonical to-be data model (membership/guardianship/supportership; docs/canon/identity/data-model.md) — canon wins, S0–S6 design choices are NOT canonical — each with a negative-path break test (cross-guardian/cross-charge data access denied) demonstrated red-before-green. Family services on v2, flag-gated; legacy intact until WP-FLAG. Unit + integration green.
riskImpact: HIGH authorization guards: a gap exposes cross-guardian charges/data (cross-person data leak).
